content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 7, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day saw no completed work, but a new pull request was opened to fix Toon action parameters. Two new issues were raised, one regarding a security grade for the MCP server and another proposing delegation chains for autonomous agents.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

No key technical developments were completed today.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
A new pull request, [#6709](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6709), was opened to address a fix related to Toon action parameters.

## CLOSED ISSUES

No issues were closed today.

## NEW ISSUES

### Security and Agent Trust Models
- A new issue, [#6710](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6710), was opened to report that the MCP server "eliza" received an A security grade on Loaditout, passing all 7 criteria in their automated security grading system.
- Another issue, [#6711](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6711), proposes the implementation of delegation chains for autonomous agents to introduce scoped authority, spend limits, and cascade revocation, moving beyond the current binary trust model.

## ACTIVE ISSUES

No active issues with more than 3 comments.
